Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1 Verified+1

Here is the test result of opening a mirrored file (created on 2.11 client) from a 2.10 client (lustre-b2_10 build #68):

On 2.11 client:
 # lfs mirror create -N -o 1 -N -o 2 -N -o 3 /mnt/lustre/file1
 # stat /mnt/lustre/file1
   File: ‘/mnt/lustre/file1’
   Size: 0               Blocks: 0          IO Block: 4194304 regular empty file
 Device: 2c54f966h/743766374d    Inode: 144115205272502273  Links: 1
 Access: (0644/-rw-r--r--)  Uid: (    0/    root)   Gid: (    0/    root)
 Access: 2018-01-25 21:06:09.000000000 +0000
 Modify: 2018-01-25 21:06:09.000000000 +0000
 Change: 2018-01-25 21:06:09.000000000 +0000
  Birth: -
 # cat /mnt/lustre/file1
 #

On 2.10 client:
 # stat /mnt/lustre/file1
   File: ‘/mnt/lustre/file1’
   Size: 0               Blocks: 0          IO Block: 4194304 regular empty file
 Device: 2c54f966h/743766374d    Inode: 144115205272502273  Links: 1
 Access: (0644/-rw-r--r--)  Uid: (    0/    root)   Gid: (    0/    root)

  Birth: -
 # ls /mnt/lustre/file1
 /mnt/lustre/file1
 # cat /mnt/lustre/file1

Patch Set 4: Verified-1

This has oopsed the MDS in both runtests and sanity in b2_10 interop testing:

 [  266.414607] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: copying /etc/hosts to /mnt/lustre/hosts.8654
 [  266.424289] BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000007
 [  266.425186] IP: [<ffffffffc0e08c3d>] mdt_stripe_get+0xfd/0x3c0 [mdt]
 [  266.426164] Oops: 0000 [#1] SMP 
 [  266.437877] CPU: 0 PID: 4284 Comm: mdt00_001 Tainted: G           OE  ------------   3.10.0-693.11.6.el7_lustre.x86_64 #1
 [  266.448851] Call Trace:
 [  266.449134]  [<ffffffffc0e2748e>] mdt_reint_setattr+0x12e/0x1090 [mdt]
 [  266.450378]  [<ffffffffc0e28470>] mdt_reint_rec+0x80/0x210 [mdt]
 [  266.450977]  [<ffffffffc0e07f8b>] mdt_reint_internal+0x5fb/0x9c0 [mdt]
 [  266.451652]  [<ffffffffc0e12e97>] mdt_reint+0x67/0x140 [mdt]
 [  266.452293]  [<ffffffffc0a96235>] tgt_request_handle+0x925/0x13b0 [ptlrpc]
 [  266.452999]  [<ffffffffc0a3a55e>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x24e/0xab0 [ptlrpc]
 [  266.454401]  [<ffffffffc0a3dd02>] ptlrpc_main+0xa92/0x1e40 [ptlrpc]

Good thing we have the extra Test-Parameters.

parents.subject: LU-10560 llite: remove extra headers from rw26.c

commit.subject: LU-10286 mdt: deny 2.10 clients to open mirrored files
commit.message:
LU-10286 mdt: deny 2.10 clients to open mirrored files

2.10 clients would manipulate mirrored layout as PFL layout, which
would damage mirrored files.

This patch only allows mirrored files to be opened by clients who
understand mirror layout.

It also fixes the problem that it should check OBD_CONNECT_FLAGS2
first before checking OBD_CONNECT2_XXX flags.
